reviews.comment:
El lugar está en un buen punto de la ciudad de Cafayate, llegan muchos viajeros a cargar gasolina, comer algo, el baño estaba limpio a pesar de que entraba mucha gente

(Translated by Google)
The place is in a good spot in the city of Cafayate; many travelers come to fill up with gas, eat something, and the bathroom was clean despite the high volume of people using it.
